name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without generic, over-designed filler.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually bloated or templated slides that require heavy manual cleanup before they're usable in a professional context. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving users fine-grained control over structure and design while still leveraging AI to accelerate creation. The result is slides that look intentional rather than auto-generated.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a clean, bespoke aesthetic
Building internal team briefings and status updates quickly
Producing client-facing proposals that don't look AI-generated
Developing product launch presentations with consistent brand style
